conditions: Only the nearest structure at the right edge (closest piling) and nearby cables are clearly visible with texture; no mid or distant pilings can be distinguished, and the background quickly fades into green haze. This corresponds to visibility limited to just the area around the 4 ft piling.

Only the nearest 4 ft piling at right edge is clearly visible with some texture. The mid/right and farther pilings are extremely faint, essentially lost in the haze. This matches conditions where only the closest piling is clear.

Only the nearest 4 ft piling on the right edge is clearly visible with texture; farther mid and back pilings are not discernible, fading into uniform blue-green haze. This corresponds to the 5 ft visibility category.

Closest 4 ft piling on right is clear with some texture; the 11 ft piling is only barely discernible as a very hazy silhouette and farther pilings are essentially lost in the green water. This indicates visibility is limited to around the range where only the nearest piling is truly visible.
